summary.main_summary: This Service Agreement outlines the terms and conditions for the provision of software development, maintenance, and technical support services by ABC Technologies Pvt. Ltd. to XYZ Retail Solutions Ltd.
summary.tldr: This Service Agreement outlines the terms and conditions for the provision of software development, maintenance, and technical support services by ABC Technologies Pvt.
key_points: Scope of services includes software development, maintenance, and technical support
Term of the agreement is 12 months with a monthly payment of INR 5,00,000
Confidentiality obligations survive for 3 years after termination

risks.title: Intellectual Property Infringement
risks.description: The Service Provider may be liable for intellectual property infringement claims arising from the services provided, which could result in significant financial losses.

risks.title: Data Protection Non-Compliance
risks.description: Failure to comply with applicable data protection and privacy laws could result in legal and reputational consequences for both parties.

risks.title: Late Payment
risks.description: Late payments may incur interest at a rate of 2% per month, which could lead to additional financial burdens on the Client.

risks.title: Termination
risks.description: Either party may terminate the agreement with 30 days' written notice, which could disrupt the services and impact the Client's business operations.

standard_clauses.title: Confidentiality
standard_clauses.content: Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of all proprietary, confidential, and trade secret information disclosed during the term of this Agreement.

standard_clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
standard_clauses.content: Except for gross negligence or willful misconduct, neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.

standard_clauses.title: Indemnification
standard_clauses.content: The Service Provider agrees to indemnify and hold harmless the Client from any third-party claims arising from infringement of intellectual property rights.

standard_clauses.title: Force Majeure
standard_clauses.content: Neither party shall be liable for delays or failures caused by events beyond reasonable control, including natural disasters, war, strikes, or government actions.
